description: performanceHeaders implementation differs between .ts and .js files
evidence: .ts uses res.end override pattern; .js uses res.on('finish') pattern. The .ts file sets header synchronously in the overridden end(), while .js sets it asynchronously via finish event.
recommendation: Rebuild server dist to ensure .ts and .js are in sync. The .ts implementation is correct; .js needs rebuild.

description: No integration tests for Sentry error tracking
evidence: AC c1 requires coverage_integration=required, but no integration tests found for sentry.ts
recommendation: Add integration test that exercises Sentry captureException, addBreadcrumb, withTransaction in a real HTTP flow

description: Mobile app has 211 ESLint errors and 32 warnings
evidence: lint output shows 243 problems (211 errors, 32 warnings) in apps/mobile
recommendation: Fix ESLint errors in mobile app, especially in sentry.ts (any types) and stub files
